issue_title: [BUG] - Removing images results in an error
issue_body_preview:
### Description

When removing images, the file component throws an error. Can't find a way to bypass this.



### Reproduction URL

https://github.com/premieroctet/next-admin/blob/main/apps/example

### Reproduction steps

```bash
Reproducible in demo environment.

1. Go to 'https://next-admin-po.v
test_description_zh: 在包含图片上传功能的表单中，上传一张图片后，点击删除/移除图片按钮，观察文件组件的行为和页面状态。
expected_result_zh: 点击删除图片按钮后，图片应被正常移除，文件组件不应抛出错误，页面保持正常可用状态，用户可以继续上传新图片或进行其他操作。
